# Works With Agents
> Free UK tender and bid compliance tools. MCP server with 12 tools.

https://workswithagents.com/ — Bid compliance toolkit
https://workswithagents.com/trust/ — Trust and compliance
https://workswithagents.com/pricing/ — Pricing
https://workswithagents.com/sectors/construction-fm/ — Construction FM
https://workswithagents.com/sectors/digital-it/ — Digital IT
https://workswithagents.com/sectors/health-care/ — Health and care
https://workswithagents.com/sectors/grants/ — Grants

## MCP server
https://github.com/vystartasv/agent-tools — Source code and docs
docker run -p 3100:3100 ghcr.io/vystartasv/agent-tools:mcp — Proxy mode
docker run -e GROQ_API_KEY=*** -p 3101:3101 ghcr.io/vystartasv/agent-tools:mcp-direct — Direct mode

## Tools (12)
- BidCheck (/tools/rfp/) — Find every mandatory requirement you have missed in an ITT
- SQ / PQQ Check (/tools/pqq/) — Plan Selection Questionnaire answers with evidence
- GrantCheck (/tools/grant/) — Meet every funder guideline
- ESGCheck (/tools/esg/) — Check ESG statements against standards
- BidMate (/tools/bidnobid/) — Decide bid or no-bid on evidence
- TimelineCheck (/tools/timeline/) — Pull every deadline and clarification date
- WinThesis (/tools/winthesis/) — Build win themes from award criteria
- ScoreCheck (/tools/score/) — See how evaluators will score your answer
- PlainCheck (/tools/plain/) — Cut jargon for evaluators
- PriceCheck (/tools/price/) — Validate pricing schedule
- RiskCheck (/tools/risk/) — Spot auto-renewals and one-sided clauses
- ObligCheck (/tools/obligations/) — List every contract obligation
